title: Financial and Investment Analysts
description: Conduct quantitative analyses of information involving investment programs or financial data of public or private institutions, including valuation of businesses.

tasks.text: Advise clients on aspects of capitalization, such as amounts, sources, or timing.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze financial or operational performance of companies facing financial difficulties to identify or recommend remedies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess companies as investments for clients by examining company facilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Collaborate on projects with other professionals, such as lawyers, accountants, or public relations experts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with investment bankers to attract new corporate clients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct financial analyses related to investments in green construction or green retrofitting projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with clients to restructure debt, refinance debt, or raise new debt.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create client presentations of plan details.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine the prices at which securities should be syndicated and offered to the public.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop and maintain client relationships.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Draw charts and graphs, using computer spreadsheets, to illustrate technical reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Employ financial models to develop solutions to financial problems or to assess the financial or capital impact of transactions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate and compare the relative quality of various securities in a given industry.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Evaluate capital needs of clients and assess market conditions to inform structuring of financial packages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inform investment decisions by analyzing financial information to forecast business, industry, or economic conditions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interpret data on price, yield, stability, future investment-risk trends, economic influences, and other factors affecting investment programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor developments in the fields of industrial technology, business, finance, and economic theory.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor fundamental economic, industrial, and corporate developments by analyzing information from financial publications and services, investment banking firms, government agencies, trade publications, company sources, or personal interviews.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform securities valuation or pricing.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare all materials for transactions or execution of deals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare plans of action for investment, using financial analyses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Present oral or written reports on general economic trends, individual corporations, and entire industries.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Purchase investments for companies in accordance with company policy.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend investments and investment timing to companies, investment firm staff, or the public.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Specialize in green financial instruments, such as socially responsible mutual funds or exchange-traded funds (ETF) that are comprised of green companies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise, train, or mentor junior team members.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
